name: cpu_audio_dsp
title: Audio effects processing
short_description: Real time audio effect graph with many voices and plugins.

structured_text.description: Runs a busy audio session as a single real time graph, with many simultaneous voices passing through filters, reverb and convolution. The work is kept on a single processing thread to match how live audio is handled, where every block must finish before the next one is due.
structured_text.metric_explanation: The score is the number of audio processing blocks completed per second, reported as operations per second, which reflects how many voices and effects can run without dropouts.
structured_text.value_interpretation: Higher is better. A higher number means more tracks and plugins can play at once at low latency before the audio starts to glitch.
structured_text.reasoning: Live audio lives or dies on steady single thread performance under a strict deadline, so this represents music and audio production better than any throughput average.

domain_gaming.explanation: Game audio mixing and spatial effects run on a real time thread alongside the engine.

domain_office.explanation: Office work involves only basic playback, not heavy audio processing.

domain_software_development.explanation: Developers rarely run real time audio graphs as part of their work.

domain_graphics_design.explanation: Still image work has little to do with audio processing.

domain_video_editing.explanation: Editors run audio effects and mixing in parallel with the video timeline.

domain_3d_rendering.explanation: Offline rendering does not depend on real time audio.

domain_audio_production.explanation: This is the core daily workload for music and audio professionals.

domain_cad_engineering.explanation: Engineering work has no meaningful audio processing component.

domain_scientific_computing.explanation: Signal processing research shares the same filter and transform kernels.

domain_ai_training.explanation: Audio feature extraction for training reuses these effect and transform stages.

domain_ai_inference.explanation: Real time audio models run preprocessing through similar DSP chains.

domain_data_science.explanation: Audio is a niche data type within general analytics.

domain_server_virt.explanation: Servers seldom run latency bound audio graphs.
